debt.introduced_by: pre-M00 protocol scaffold; recorded by WP-M00-002
debt.reason: Three existing service names and their RPC request/response types predate Buf STANDARD naming rules. Renaming them inside AB-M00-002 would change public generated APIs and gRPC method names.
debt.consequence: Buf uses file-scoped ignores for the existing definitions, while an exact strict-lint fingerprint and negative probe prevent any additional violation from being hidden by those ignores.
debt.repayment_trigger: Resolve with DEBT-0001 in the dedicated protocol-epoch package before the first production or external generated-client consumer.
